global_context.description: This section exists for human readers only. Agents receive their protocol embedded in each task.
global_context.testing_philosophy: TDD with convex-test + Vitest for logic. Playwright E2E for UI flows. NO React component tests. NO mocks except vi.useFakeTimers() and external network calls.

dev_servers.convex: Convex dev running alongside (npx convex dev)

task_protocol_template._comment: This exact block is embedded in every task under 'task_protocol'. Agents see it inline — no memory dependency.
steps: 1. READ the task description, acceptance criteria, and files_to_read thoroughly before writing any code.
2. TDD: Write failing tests FIRST (Convex tests for logic, Vitest for utilities). Watch them fail. Then implement code to make them pass.
3. Run ALL verification commands in order: bun run typecheck → bun run build → bun run lint:fix → bun run test → bun run format
4. SMOKE TEST: Verify dev server is still running — curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3005 must return 200. Check Convex dev has no schema errors.
5. Check acceptance criteria — every single one must pass.
6. If ANY verification or acceptance criteria fails: git stash your changes, report what failed, do NOT commit broken code.
7. Update docs/WIP.md with task completion status.
8. Commit to feat/nutrition branch with descriptive message referencing the task ID (e.g., 'W1-02: Add nutrition goals to profile schema').
9. For UI tasks: Browser-test via Claude-in-Chrome on localhost:3005. Verify the component renders, interacts correctly, and console has no errors.
task_protocol_template.rollback_strategy: If verification fails after 2 attempts to fix: git stash, report the failure with exact error output, and flag the task as BLOCKED in docs/WIP.md. Do NOT push broken code. Do NOT skip failing tests.
task_protocol_template.file_conflict_rule: If another task in your wave modifies the same file, those tasks MUST run sequentially, not in parallel. Check the task's files_to_modify list before starting.

testing_rules.convex_functions: Write convex-test tests in convex/*.test.ts. Use convex-test with real database. No mocks except vi.useFakeTimers().
testing_rules.utility_functions: Write Vitest tests in shared/__tests__/ or src/**/__tests__/. Pure unit tests.
testing_rules.ui_flows: Write Playwright E2E tests in e2e/*.spec.ts. Test real user flows against real backend.
testing_rules.forbidden: NO React component tests. NO render(). NO React Testing Library. NO mock data unless absolutely unavoidable (justify with a comment).

waves.name: Core UI
waves.description: Port Agent A's modular components into main repo, replacing mock data with real hooks and applying locked visual decisions. Every UI component gets Playwright E2E tests in this wave — NOT deferred to Wave 5.

tasks.title: Build useNutritionStore (UI state only)
tasks.description:
Create useReducer-based hook for UI state: view, searchQuery, stagingItems, modals, mealSlot. Search uses Fuse.js against real FOOD_REGISTRY (threshold 0.4, min 3 chars). Staging aggregates same canonicalName. Staging persists across view changes.

TDD: Write Vitest tests for the reducer FIRST — test every action type, staging aggregation logic, and search threshold behaviour. The reducer is a pure function, perfect for TDD.

steps: 1. READ the task description, acceptance criteria, and files_to_read thoroughly before writing any code.

2. TDD: Write failing Vitest tests FIRST for the reducer: every action type, staging aggregation (same canonicalName collapses), search filtering (threshold 0.4, min 3 chars), staging persistence across view changes. Watch them fail. Then implement.
3. Run ALL verification commands in order: bun run typecheck → bun run build → bun run lint:fix → bun run test → bun run format
4. SMOKE TEST: Verify dev server is still running — curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3005 must return 200.
5. Check acceptance criteria — every single one must pass.
6. If ANY verification or acceptance criteria fails: git stash your changes, report what failed, do NOT commit broken code.
7. Update docs/WIP.md with task completion status.
8. Commit to feat/nutrition branch with descriptive message referencing the task ID.
task_protocol.rollback_strategy: If verification fails after 2 attempts to fix: git stash, report the failure with exact error output, and flag the task as BLOCKED in docs/WIP.md. Do NOT push broken code. Do NOT skip failing tests.
task_protocol.file_conflict_rule: If another task in your wave modifies the same file, those tasks MUST run sequentially, not in parallel. Check the task's files_to_modify list before starting.

testing_rules.tdd_targets: src/components/track/nutrition/__tests__/useNutritionStore.test.ts — test all 14+ action types, staging aggregation, search thresholds, view persistence
testing_rules.forbidden: NO React component tests. NO mock data imports.

acceptance_criteria: Fuse.js search against real FOOD_REGISTRY (threshold 0.4, min 3 chars)

tasks.title: Wire Log Food button to food parsing pipeline
tasks.description:
When user has staging items and hits Log Food: reconstruct rawInput from items ('200g chicken breast, 150g white rice'), call handleLogFood from useFoodParsing. For items already matched (matchStatus='matched'), optionally pre-fill items array to skip redundant matching. Clear staging on success. Food logging MUST go through addSyncedLog with type='food'.

TDD: Write Convex test for the food logging flow. Playwright E2E: type food → stage → log → verify appears in TodayLog.

tasks.title: Add error boundary around NutritionCard
tasks.description:
NEW TASK — not in v1 plan. Create a NutritionCardErrorBoundary that wraps NutritionCard in Track.tsx. If NutritionCard crashes, show a fallback UI with 'Nutrition card failed to load' message and a retry button. This prevents the entire Track page from dying if NutritionCard has a runtime error.

The error boundary should log the error to console for debugging.

This task MUST be completed before W3-05 (mounting in Track page).

steps: 1. READ the task description, acceptance criteria, and files_to_read thoroughly before writing any code.
2. Build the NutritionCardErrorBoundary component.
3. Write Playwright E2E test that verifies the error boundary catches errors and shows fallback UI (may need a test-only prop to trigger error).
4. Run ALL verification commands in order: bun run typecheck → bun run build → bun run lint:fix → bun run test → bun run format
5. Run Playwright: bunx playwright test e2e/nutrition-card.spec.ts

tasks.title: End-to-end integration test: full nutrition flow
tasks.description:
NEW TASK — not in v1 plan. Write a comprehensive Playwright E2E test that verifies the FULL flow works end-to-end:

1. Navigate to Track page
2. Type a food in the search input (e.g., 'white rice')
3. Add to staging via + button
4. Adjust portion in staging modal
5. Click Log Food
6. Verify food appears in TodayLog
7. Verify calorie ring updates
8. Open calorie detail view
9. Verify food appears under correct meal slot
10. Delete the food
11. Verify calorie ring decreases
12. Log water via water modal
13. Verify water progress bar updates

This is the single most important test in the entire plan. If this passes, the feature works.

steps: 1. READ the task description and the entire e2e/nutrition-card.spec.ts file to understand existing test patterns.
2. Write the comprehensive E2E test covering all 13 steps in the description.
3. Run: bunx playwright test e2e/nutrition-full-flow.spec.ts
4. SMOKE TEST: Verify dev server is still running — curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3005 must return 200.
5. If ANY test fails: document the exact failure, identify which Wave 3 task produced the bug, flag it.
6. Update docs/WIP.md with task completion status.
7. Commit to feat/nutrition branch with descriptive message referencing the task ID.
task_protocol.rollback_strategy: This task only adds a test file — no rollback needed. If tests fail, they reveal bugs in earlier tasks that need fixing.
task_protocol.file_conflict_rule: No conflicts — this creates a new test file.

testing_rules.forbidden: NO React component tests. NO mocks.

acceptance_criteria: E2E test covers all 13 steps in the description
Dev server still returns 200 on localhost:3005
